CustomField.description: Developer name of the approval step as defined in the Approval Process setup (e.g. HOCApproval). Must match exactly — this is how the LWC identifies which config applies at runtime.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the step's API name from Setup → Approval Processes → [Process] → Approval Steps. For example: HOCApproval or DCOApproval.
CustomField.label: Step Developer Name
